programs.hint: E9020: no main function defined. Every EXECUTABLE toke program needs an entry point. Add `f=main():$i64{<0;}` (or one that reads stdin via io.readln(), calls your helper functions, and prints results via io.println). Library-only modules compile under --check but cannot be built into a runnable binary.

Code is incomplete — truncated or an unclosed (/[/{/". Count opening vs closing delimiters; if the program looks heavily truncated, rewrite the complete program from scratch rather than trying to patch the end.

programs.hint: Missing semicolon. Toke separates EVERY statement with ; (never newlines). Every let/assignment/call/return needs a trailing ;. Inside lp(){body}, body statements also need ; between them.
